title: tetramicra bulbosa
intro: Tetramicra bulbosa is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the small-flowered Tetramicra. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tetramicra bulbosa include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Tetramicra bulbosa include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to create remedies for various health conditions.
